hooks.prompt: Before finishing: verify that CHANGES_<date>_<desc>.md was created in reports/docs-architect/discovery/ AND CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section was updated if a public contract changed. If either is missing, output a warning listing what is absent. Do not block — just warn.

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force|push.*-f '; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Force push blocked. Use --force-with-lease or coordinate manually."}' >&2; exit 2; fi
